DTR  |  Listen to a Classroom Conversation
LCC-HS11-HSVPAMA1112-TTM-LAT-01 | Deck A | L1 x BR-300L

The Loop of Forty Faces

Click  🎧  to listen.
Listen to a conversation between a teacher and a student. Listen carefully. You will hear the conversation only once. After listening, you will answer some questions.
Listen to the Conversation
1QUESTION 1: What is the teacher mainly helping the student understand about the projection?
2QUESTION 2: According to the teacher, what changes when the order of the photos is reversed?
3QUESTION 3: What does the student's final response suggest she now understands about her role as the curator?
Choose the best answer for each question. You may change your answers before submitting.
Answer all 3 questions to submit.
SMART SUPPORT:
Go back to the conversation. Listen again. Say one thing the teacher says and one thing the student says out loud.
CA ELD PI.A.1, PI.A.3, PI.B.5, PI.B.6 (Grades 11-12)  |  CA Media Arts Prof.MA:Pr4  |  HS Media Arts 11-12 / Producing / Select, Analyze, and Interpret
